title: krugia ferruginea
intro: Krugia ferruginea, also known as the Yellow Mille, is a flowering plant species native to tropical Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Krugia ferruginea include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and support the immune system. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are often dried and used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential applications.
